response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified first song 'Remote Controller' (Remocon) via on-screen text. Performed search: 'Remote Controller Jesus-P Japanese and English lyrics'. 2. Identified second song 'DIAMOND GIRLFRIEND' via on-screen text. Performed search: 'Diamond Girlfriend MOTSU Japanese and English lyrics'. 3. Mapped scenes based on audio content and song structure. 4. Compiled JSON with metadata and found lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video is a performance featuring two vocal songs, "Remote Controller" (Remocon) performed by VTubers Koskei Bijou and Robocosan, and "DIAMOND GIRLFRIEND" performed by VTubers IRyS and Ninomae Ina'nis. There is a dialogue segment between the two performances.

scenes.description: VTubers Koskei Bijou and Robocosan perform the song 'Remote Controller' (Remocon).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
リモコン　リモコン　リモコン！ 
この状況を操るのさ 
 
世界が終わっても 
この部屋に閉じこもってても 
出口が見つからなくても 
踊り続けるのさ 
踊り続けるのさ！ 
 
リモコン　リモコン 
全ては僕の思い通り！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Remote Control, Remote Controller, Remo-con! 
It's time to take control of this situation 
 
Even if the world is ending 
Even if I'm stuck in this room 
Even if I can't find a way out 
I'll just keep dancing 
I'll just keep on dancing! 
 
Just take control 
Just take control 
Everything is under control!

scenes.description: Dialogue and transition segment involving VTubers Koskei Bijou, Robocosan, IRyS, and Ninomae Ina'nis.
VTubers IRyS and Ninomae Ina'nis perform 'DIAMOND GIRLFRIEND'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Save me, I think I'm freezing up, so cold inside 
舞台はQuiet room ふたり 
Save me, I need a guiding touch in these dark times 
恋人たちのシーン 
Inside the maze of your heart, I'm the soul that strays 
That's right But baby look at me, you're not blind 
Oh, can't you see that I can be refined 
Your heart is super hot right now, it's time 
To be your DIAMOND GIRLFRIEND 
Overheating love machine 
Burning hot (Hot), hot (Hot), hot (Untouchable) 
Silver flames consuming me 
Let them light the way 
So precious girlfriend, go, go, go 
Overheating love machine 
Burning hot (Hot), hot (Hot), hot (On the rock machine) 
Nothing stops this awakened soul 
Break it all, break it all, break it all
